creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Re: <https://forums.freebsd.org/posts/659856>, it seems to me that the result with pkgbase is correct. In particular: 

> … the confusion around mixed patch levels will become less commonplace 👍

So, documentation. 

We can begin with simple, non-contentious freebsd-src pull requests for freebsd-version(1).

<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=freebsd-version&sektion=1&manpath=freebsd-release>

Then, on to frequently asked questions <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/faq/> …
